description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring a combination of open shelves, drawers, and a single door compartment. The front side displays two drawers with sleek black handles, two open shelves, and a vertical cabinet door with a metallic handle. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The cabinet is supported by small, round black feet and includes a metallic cylindrical support on one side, adding a contemporary touch. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving it a natural and stylish appearance. This piece is suitable for use in living rooms, offices, or urban public spaces for storage and organization.
description: A light oak-finished wooden cabinet with drawers, open shelves, and a single door, featuring black and metallic handles and a flat top surface. The design is modern and functional, with visible wood grain and sturdy black feet.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the depth of the cabinet, the cylindrical metallic support, and a partial glimpse of the open shelf area.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying two drawers, two open shelves, and a single door with handles, as well as the flat top and supporting feet.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, showing a plain wood grain panel with no visible features except the top and feet.
